title: HDFC Securities Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Securities Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Securities Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Securities Digital Technologies:
HDFC Securities Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
